note: Two follow-ups from the cache-vs-chain-truth investigation. (1) sost-cli wallet-export and wallet-import outputs now tag the UTXOs and Balance lines as '(offline cache snapshot)' so users do not read them as live on-chain balance. Both blocks add a short note pointing the user at `sost-cli --wallet <path> listaddresses` for chain truth, with the wording matching the new section 12 of the canonical Wallet & Backup Security doc. The .enc format itself is unchanged; existing .enc files keep working byte-for-byte. (2) The web wallet's Backup view (#view-backup, the page reached via the Backup / Security sidebar button) gains a one-line Reference link below the Download Encrypted Backup button, pointing at sost-wallet-security.html. Wording matches the existing Send-mechanics reference link at the bottom of the Send card. NO consensus, NO RPC schema, NO node, NO miner, NO transaction wire format, NO .enc format change.
